properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4 v4 v4 v4 v4 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It was my cross You bore So I could live in the freedom You died for And now my life is Yours And I will sing of Your goodness forevermore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: … Worthy is Your name, Jesus You deserve the praise Worthy is Your name Worthy is Your name, Jesus You deserve the praise Worthy is Your name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: … And now my shame is gone I stand amazed in Your love undeniable Your grace goes on and on And I will sing of Your goodness forevermore

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: … Be exalted now in the heavens As Your glory fills this place You alone deserve our praise You're the name above all names

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: … Worthy is Your name, Jesus You deserve the praise Worthy is Your name Worthy is Your name, Jesus You deserve the praise
